dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HRES 1420 IH: Honoring the 31st International President and CEO of Alpha Kappa Alpha Sorority, Inc., Danette Anthony Reed.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Williams of Georgia (for herself, Ms. Sewell, Ms. Wilson of Florida, Mrs. Sykes, Mrs. Watson Coleman, and Ms. Adams) submitted the following resolution; which was referred to the Committee on Education and Workforce

form.official-title: Honoring the 31st International President and CEO of Alpha Kappa Alpha Sorority, Inc., Danette Anthony Reed.

whereas.text: Whereas Madam President Danette Anthony Reed, a 50-year member, ascended to serve as the 31st International President and CEO and led the sorority to greater heights; and

Whereas she has implemented initiatives that strengthen the sisterhood, empower families, build economic wealth, enhance the environment, advocate for social justice, and uplift local communities: Now, therefore, be it

section.text: That the House of Representatives congratulates and commends Alpha Kappa Alpha Sorority, Inc., International President and CEO Danette Anthony Reed for her exemplary service and leadership.
